style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left: a vertical stack of small tiles each drawn with a tiny padlock, labelled IDENTITY, CSRF, PARAMETERIZED SQL, RESPONSE ENVELOPE, ERROR HANDLING, API CLIENT, grouped under a heading DECIDED IN CODE. A wide arrow carries them to a simple robot token labelled AI AGENT in the centre. From the agent, arrows add three boxes on the right labelled NEW FEATURE. Between the agent and the new features sits a gate labelled HARNESS CHECK. A rust caption reads INHERIT, DON'T REINVENT. No logos, no people beyond a simple token.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left: a vertical stack of small tiles each drawn with a tiny padlock, labelled IDENTITY, CSRF, PARAMETERIZED SQL, RESPONSE ENVELOPE, ERROR HANDLING, API CLIENT, grouped under a heading DECIDED IN CODE. A wide arrow carries them to a simple robot token labelled AI AGENT in the centre. From the agent, arrows add three boxes on the right labelled NEW FEATURE. Between the agent and the new features sits a gate labelled HARNESS CHECK. A rust caption reads INHERIT, DON'T REINVENT. No logos, no people beyond a simple token.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
